allow: Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec smartdocs-glpi find /var/www/html/glpi/files/_log -type f)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec smartdocs-glpi sh -c "tail -n 100 /var/log/apache2/error.log 2>/dev/null || tail -n 100 /var/log/php*.log 2>/dev/null || true")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec smartdocs-db mysql -uroot -pglpiroot glpi -e "SELECT id,name,directory,version,state FROM glpi_plugins WHERE directory='smartdocs';")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec smartdocs-glpi grep -n "function add\\b" /var/www/html/glpi/src/Document.php)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec smartdocs-glpi grep -n "static function file" /var/www/html/glpi/src/Html.php)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec smartdocs-glpi grep -n "_filename\\|uploadFiles\\|function add\(" /var/www/html/glpi/src/Document.php)
